title: stipa capillata f. orthopogon
intro: Stipa capillata f. orthopogon, also known as Orthopogon capillatus, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is a type of grass that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Stipa capillata f. orthopogon is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
